title: Recover Deleted Automations
excerpt:
I just made a big mistake and deleted several automations. I thought automations were by board and not over everything so I had duplicated a board and starting deleting it’s automations. 
Can I recover these?

posts.author: kswiss50 (Kendall Shortt)
posts.cookedHtml:
I just made a big mistake and deleted several automations. I thought automations were by board and not over everything so I had duplicated a board and starting deleting it’s automations.

Can I recover these?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @kswiss50, are the automations still on your original board? If you email support@monday.com we’d love to help you with this further!
